rationale: The cited paper appears only in the methods section as an example for using word-count/text-analysis variables in computational linguistics work ("e.g., Melumad, Inman, and Pham 2019"). The citing article does not use it to develop the voice numerosity theory, hypotheses, moderators, or mediation claims. Its role is limited to background support for operationalization of linguistic controls, so the citation is a passing methodological mention.
